root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) AS control_name , sum((case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance else 0 end))as shr , sum((case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance else 0 end))as lon , sum((case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance else 0 end))as dep , count((case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR'and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance >0 then sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no end))as shr_member_count , count(distinct(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON'and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance >0 then sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no end))as lon_member_count , count(distinct(case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP'and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance >0 then sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no end))as dep_member_count --, sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance)as ddd from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = to_date('30/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance >0 and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group in ('SHR','LON','DEP') /*WHERE*/ group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
